# Visual Studio temporary files
.vs/
*.user
*.suo
*.cache
*.pdb
*.log

# Build folders
bin/
obj/

# Files generated by Visual Studio
*.dbmdl
*.jfm
*.class
*.dll

# Rider/Resharper
.idea/
*.sln.iml

# Node / Blazor WebApp folders
wwwroot/lib/
node_modules/

# OS files
Thumbs.db
.DS_Store

# Environment files (optional)
*.env
